wallet.label: Label
wallet.chainsHint: New wallets track every chain with an RPC provider in the server sync config.

settings.title: Settings — Server environment
settings.desc: The policy-server address the dashboard and the service worker will call. Leave empty to use the build default (PASU_SERVER_URL).
settings.savedNote: Saved — applied to the service worker immediately. The dashboard picks it up after a <reload>reload</reload>.
settings.invalidServerUrl: Refused to save this server URL. Use the production server, the build-time server, or a loopback development URL.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the language for the dashboard UI.
settings.openaiDesc: Used to draft policies from natural language in the editor's LLM tab. The key is stored only in this browser, never sent to our server — it's used solely for direct requests to OpenAI.
settings.openaiPlaceholderSet: A key is set — enter a new one to replace it
settings.openaiSaveError: Failed to save the API key: {{error}}
settings.openaiBadPrefix: An OpenAI API key usually starts with 'sk-'.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: My account
profile.noListings: You haven't published anything to Policy Hub yet. Create a policy in the editor and share it with "Publish to Policy Hub".
profile.deleteListingConfirm:
Delete "{{name}}" from Policy Hub?
This cannot be undone.
profile.resetDesc: Wipes the data stored for this account. This cannot be undone.
profile.resetWalletsConfirm_one:
Remove the {{count}} tracked wallet?
This cannot be undone.
profile.resetWalletsConfirm_other:
Remove all {{count}} tracked wallets?
This cannot be undone.
profile.resetPoliciesSub: Deletes all of my {{policyCount}} policies · {{setCount}} packages.
profile.resetPoliciesConfirm:
Delete all of my {{policyCount}} policies and {{setCount}} packages?
This cannot be undone.
profile.resetPoliciesDone: All policies and packages have been reset.
